description.value:
Your plant body is hollow, including a large open space within your arms that you can use to store objects. Your features might be reminiscent of a hollow-stemmed plant like bamboo or thistle, or you might have hollows protected by a hard plant material like seed shells or the rind of a gourd.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Internal Compartment] standardized ancestry feat, except you can store up to 1 Bulk in your body, and it only takes 1 action to store an object this way.

Hollow leshies are often photosynthetic.
